n: Battle of Dol Baran: Bravely Fallen

steps.t: Wounded Rohirrim warriors lie atop Dol Baran, beyond the Rohirrim encampment. Captain Féarn has asked you to rescue injured Rohirrim warriors atop Dol…
Wounded Rohirrim warriors lie atop Dol Baran, beyond the Rohirrim encampment. Captain Féarn has asked you to rescue injured Rohirrim warriors atop Dol…

Wounded Rohirrim warriors lie atop Dol Baran, beyond the Rohirrim encampment. Captain Féarn has asked you to rescue injured Rohirrim warriors atop Dol…
Captain Féarn can be found atop Dol Baran. You should return to Captain Féarn with tidings of your victory.
